text: I feel a quiet sense of anticipation—the kind that arises in unfamiliar, modern spaces filled with glass and clean lines. As I move towards the vibrant wall of the second image, awash in colors and screens, curiosity takes hold. R + D, research and innovation: these are themes that make me reflect on the human desire to understand and transform. Here, I feel at once small and vital, surrounded by evidence of collective thought and creativity, my mind eager to inquire further.
